title: Optimized End-to-End Word of the Day Workflow

workflow.name: asset_discovery
workflow.description: Before every Word patch, discover all Word-related assets across D/AD/ADB/AG48/AG56/AG63/AG69/generated/UI/scripts/docs.

workflow.name: candidate_word_pool
workflow.description: Use D02/AG69 candidate records only as seed/candidate pool; do not treat preview approval as final approval.

workflow.name: lexical_source_capture
workflow.description: Capture exact lexical/source evidence for pilot words with source_access_checked and reuse_note_checked.

workflow.name: language_and_form_validation
workflow.description: Validate Sanskrit/Hindi form, meaning support, transliteration/script discipline and internal textual discipline.

workflow.name: reviewed_bank_gate
workflow.description: Promote only evidence-complete records to reviewed bank.

workflow.name: approved_bank_gate
workflow.description: Approve only reviewed records that pass source, language, claim-level and public-use gates.

workflow.name: selection_engine
workflow.description: Use approved bank only. Selector may combine duplicate-control, Tithi, Vara, festival/theme context only after Panchang methodology validation.

workflow.name: daily_output_generation
workflow.description: Generate bounded Word output from approved selected record; no AI invention and no unsupported etymology/classical/scriptural claim.

workflow.name: result_saving_model
workflow.description: Save daily result and duplicate-control history in static governed data first; Supabase/database remains blocked until approved.

workflow.name: existing_ui_update
workflow.description: Update existing homepage Word card data source only; do not create duplicate card.

workflow.name: closure
workflow.description: Record closure with no backend/Auth/V02 activation unless separately approved.

optimization_rules: One selector only: merge useful D02/AG48/AG69 selection logic instead of running parallel selectors.
One public Word card only: preserve existing UI.
One governed output path only: AG69 approved bank must eventually replace AG63 preview output through a controlled replacement stage.
Adjacent Sutra/Mantra/Reflection logic is preserved as context but excluded from Word runtime now.
Scout sources are not evidence until exact manual lookup is captured.
